chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 376 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 3. For hearing of MA No.3090/2021 (Stay/App.) 21-06-2021 Mr. Abdul Waheed Bhanbhro, Advocate for applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah Rizvi, Deputy Prosecutor General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant does not press this Criminal Miscellaneous Application, which is accordingly dismissed as withdrawn along with the listed application. J U D G E Abdul Basit
